learnings: Added '## ADO Integration (Optional)' section to Skills/master-architect/SKILL.md, positioned after Phase 3 (Artifact Generation) and before Phase 4 (Quality Assurance).
The section defines four sub-steps: Pre-Phase (read work item), Post-Phase A (update User Story), Post-Phase B (create child Tasks with STATE_FILE lines), and Post-Phase C (write ado-tasks.json).
ado-tasks.json schema documented: workItemId, project, org, and taskMappings array with stateFile/taskId/taskTitle per plan.
manual_testing_steps: Verify the User Story description is updated in ADO with a planner summary.
Verify child Tasks are created in ADO — each with a STATE_FILE: line in the description.
Verify ado-tasks.json is created in the plan directory with correct task ID mappings.
